results.title: Not cool: the air conditioning scams offering fake deals in the heatwave - The Guardian
results.description: Not cool: the air conditioning scams offering fake deals in the heatwave The Guardian "A lot of these companies use the shorthand 'AC' when in fact, they meant that it’s an air cooler, and that’s terribly misleading," said Konstantin Elkanov, brand marketing manager. https://nyti.ms/4eCcNDY facebook.com Lucrative summer business: How profiteers earn money with fake air conditioners heise online Desperate households issued major £149.99 air conditioning warning Daily Express
